description_long: This is a standard wine bottle with a deep burgundy glass body and a matching burgundy closure at the top. The bottle features a cylindrical shape with gently sloping shoulders and a long, narrow neck. A white rectangular label is affixed to the front, displaying the text 'ONLINE LABEL' and an image of a cluster of grapes, both centrally positioned. The glass surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light subtly. The closure appears to be covered by a capsule matching the color of the bottle neck. The back of the bottle is unadorned, with no additional labels or markings visible.
description: A glossy burgundy wine bottle with a white label featuring text and a grape image, topped with a matching capsule.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white label with 'ONLINE LABEL' text and a grape image clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled rear-left view, label partially visible, showing the bottle's smooth, glossy surface and the capsule at the top.
description_view_2: Rear view with no label or markings, highlighting the uninterrupted burgundy glass surface.
description_view_3: Angled rear-right view, edge of the label just visible, showing the bottle's cylindrical shape and long neck.
attribute_label_or_branding: A white rectangular label on the front, centered vertically, with black text reading 'ONLINE LABEL' and an image of a grape cluster. The label is medium-sized, with a clean, modern design and no additional logos or symbols.
attribute_bottle_neck_shape: Long, narrow, and straight neck with a gentle taper toward the top and a slight bulge at the transition to the bottle body.
